item.title: That Looked Expensive
item.dc:creator: larskongo

item.title: Hundrets of Thousands are demonstrating.
item.description: Hello USA, this is what a demonstration against a dictator looks like, not just Luigi memes. Hundreds of thousands gathered on the streets of Istanbul this Saturday during protests in Turkey. The CHP is even talking about 2.2 million demonstrators. They are demanding İmamoğlu's release and the resignation of the Erdoğan government.
item.dc:creator: truemdgeist1337

item.title: A WiFi on animal only lazy Sunday dump
item.dc:creator: Imstoodrightbehindyou

item.title: PROTEST UPDATE: Cliff Cash posted a video. "YES PROTESTING WORKS!"
item.description:
Cliff Cash has a simple request: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EJ3NBaTx1W8 Please, don't give up hope. Keep the pressure up and join him if at all possible. If NOT possible, but you can go somewhere else, then do it. If you can't protest at all, then please share his video and give it a like and subscribe to him too to get that bloody algorithm to wake up. We each have a part to play in this, big or small.
The rage is building. People harness it for positive change, but people need to ACT and NOW. THESE are (some of) the people responsible - the Council for National Policy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NgQoOCdV6aU FUCK them. (Not the two people in the video though, they're cool.)
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Ghost Crisis Hotline
item.description: Hey Imgurians, just wanted to take a moment to say thanks for being so welcoming. We know that promotional posts are not appreciated here – just like on all other platforms. Nevertheless, we tried our luck a few days ago and received a lot of upvotes, awards and friendly comments for promoting our upcoming book. You guys are just incredible. Thank you. A thousand kisses and hugs, Elizabeth and Jonathan
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

Hey great work guys!
Peeing hard or hardly peeing?
STROOP
r/ididnthaveeggs
I don't usually pay my propagate taxes, but this little guy was throwing some strong reaper vibes when I was moving it out of the prop tray to a big boy pot.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1315 (LOTR-themed)
item.description:
Let's get this Lembas bread.
BIG @sisipherr vibes
Oops, this one is in here twice. Oh well.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep." [Whispered] "glory pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Those Demon-crats...
item.dc:creator: SofisticatedPhalcon

item.title: What Happened Today #58
item.description: They’re not hiding it. They’re banning books, firing peacekeepers, and threatening to annex Greenland. This isn’t a stunt. It’s a strategy — from anime ICE memes to purging the Pentagon, they’re showing us exactly how far they’ll go. Believe them. Read today’s post. Share it. Subscribe for free to stay informed and loud --> https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/29/trump-greenland-military-force-denmark/82722287007/ 2. https://apnews.com/article/attack-plans-trump-signal-hegseth-waltz-759a404c89ee45468fb54a2be800c32a 3. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/us-institute-of-peace-staff-termination-notices/ 4. https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/elections/2025/03/29/wisconsin-court-rejects-effort-to-block-elon-musk-voter-payments/82721261007/ 5. https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/03/29/secret-pentagon-memo-hegseth-heritage-foundation-china/ 6. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trump-says-couldnt-care-less-automakers-raise-prices-tariffs-rcna198731 7. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/29/nx-s1-5344487/white-house-correspondents-dinner-amber-ruffin 8. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/29/us/politics/victoria-spartz-republican-town-hall-doge.html 9. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/29/protesters-elon-musk-tesla-00259304 10. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/29/doge-marco-elez-software-engineer-us-payroll-00259303 11. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/29/trump-memes-immigration-policies 12. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/world/trump-administration-reportedly-moves-to-ban-jackie-robinson-biography-from-naval-academy-library/ar-AA1BURCM 13. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/we-re-kind-of-BingNewsVerp

item.title: Roger Moore - a class act
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Historical Memes - Vol 2; May '19
item.description: I joined the Imgur community nearly a decade ago. I have seen the rise and fall of empires, of celebrities come and go. I was there when nudes could be found in User Sub, when Dickbutt was king, and when memes were the currency that fueled this enterprise. I have made my mecca to Edward Macaroni Fork, served in the skeleton wars, and joined in the Secret Santa tradition. I have had a few posts of note. I have tried my hand as a comment farmer. But mostly, I have made my way as a lurker, favoriting and forgetting, and stealing your memes. It is now time that I return those memes to the wild. It is now time that I give back to the community that has given so much. It is now time.... for my second phone-clearing dump. Unfortunately, due to a significant amount of personal buffoonery, I lost the phone containing records from early 2016 through early 2019. My first post began there, in Mar of 2019, and now we continue on this journey. But, be ye not afraid! I'm no historian nor curator; I am an uncivilized heathen that has plundered with no discerning taste for quality and I shall give back in the same manner. The only concurrent theme in the following volumes shall be cataloging when these memes were stolen. Enjoy, don't enjoy, I really don't care.
item.dc:creator: GrizzlyBeer26

item.title: Fancy that .....
item.description:
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transgender_history
Lots of examples but one that stands out is the "Christians" who claim that there are only two genders "bEcAuSe ThE BiBLe SaYs" when Judaism recognizes eight genders and the First Human (ha'adam) was both male and female, like the God in whose image they were made (see Gen. Rabbah 8:1, Ber. 61a, Eruvin 18a, etc.). The gender binary is Imperialist Christian nonsense. https://www.myjewishlearning.com/article/the-eight-genders-in-the-talmud/
item.dc:creator: Xalten2
